content.en:
Concentrating the human race is to concentrate the human race, so that the population will be dense, and it will naturally be better protected, otherwise with the territory of the human race, such a large range, no matter how many earth honors can not protect it, a little fluctuation is enough to annihilate the human race of a star.

"Build the Starry Sky Continent!"

Ye Tian thought of this method.

In the midst of chaos, there are countless chaotic continents, and countless creatures live on the chaotic continents, and there are also many starry sky continents in the Cangyu universe, replacing the stars.

The area of a starry sky continent can far exceed the stars, and if human beings are concentrated on the starry sky continent, they can be better managed and developed.

"A star field will be transformed into a starry sky continent, and all the humans in a star field will be concentrated on the starry sky continent, and then a group of earth lords will be sent to sit on the starry sky continent to protect the humans on the starry sky continent!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, he convened a meeting of the Terran Lords and put forward his proposal.

In this regard, the Terran Earth Venerables naturally did not have any opinions, and all obeyed Ye Tian's arrangement and implemented the Starry Sky Continent plan.

And this plan was all notified, and it was transmitted to the human forces in the star fields, and then the human forces were transmitted to every galaxy and every planet.

Disks.

Ye Tian came here, this is his hometown Star Domain, and naturally he personally created the Starry Sky Continent.

And the center of the starry continent is designated as the earth.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled to the earth, and the power of the vast sea acted on the earth.

In the next moment, the planets of the Milky Way instantly shuttled through the starry sky to the side of the earth and merged into the earth.

Bang!!!

On the earth, people found that the heavens and the earth have changed greatly, the continents are becoming larger and extended, and countless human beings have descended on the new continent.

One, two, three......

Hundreds of millions of planets merged into the earth, and a starry continent gradually formed.

At the same time, the suns are superimposed on layers of space, radiating the entire starry sky continent, no matter where you are in the starry sky continent, you can see a sun, and the sun will also move.

This kind of method was very difficult for other cultivators, but an existence like Ye Tian could easily create it.

Soon, all the planets of the Galactic Star merged into the Starry Sky Continent.

Then, Ye Tian captured all the planets in the other star fields and forcibly integrated them into the Starry Sky Continent.

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed, and all the planets in the entire area have been integrated into the Starry Sky Continent, and countless humans in the Circle have also lived on the Starry Sky Continent.

If you look at it from the top of the Starry Sky Continent, you can see countless continents dotted like stars on the huge ocean.

Countless human beings and countless stars have created this starry sky continent.

Billions of billions of human beings live above, and due to the condensation of the planet, the condensation of the vitality, and the many large arrays arranged by Ye Tian, the vitality on this starry sky continent is extremely rich, but the most intense place is undoubtedly this area of the earth.

In the future, this area of the earth will also develop into the central area of this starry continent.

"I am the God General of Ten Thousand Laws, in the future, this Starry Sky Continent will be named the Huaxia Continent!"

Ye Tian's voice spread throughout the Starry Sky Continent.

At this moment, this starry sky continent has a name - Huaxia Continent.

Immediately, Ye Tian built a fairy palace in the sky above the Huaxia Continent, this is where the earth lords live, if someone breaks through to become the earth lord, they can enter the fairy palace, so that they can manage the entire Huaxia continent.

Moreover, the earth lords live in the immortal palace, which is also convenient for the entire Chinese continent.

There is no Earth Venerable in the Pan Domain, but under Ye Tian's order, one by one the Di Venerable came to the Pan Domain Immortal Palace, and there are many six or seven star Earth Venerables.

Ye Tian was the fastest at creating the Starry Sky Continent, but it didn't take long for the other star fields to build the Starry Sky Continent.

A few years later.

The Terran territory has all been transformed into starry sky continents, and each starry sky continent has arranged a large number of defensive formations, which do not restrict the progress of human beings, but prevent other races from entering and leaving, and once opened, its defense is enough to block a divine general's blow.

These formations are basically the shadow of Ye Tian's shot, otherwise with the strength of other Earth Venerables, it would be difficult to arrange a powerful formation.

Thousands of years have passed.

this day.

The mist area opened again, and Ye Tian entered the mist area and came to the Chaos God Realm.

Chaos God Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian came, the gods and generals of the Oxen Clan came to greet Ye Tian.

"Your Highness!"

Niu Ryu said respectfully.

"I'm going to the temple!"

Saying that, Ye Tian revealed his aura, and he suddenly reached the combat power of a three-star god general.

"Congratulations, Your Highness!"

Niu Ryu and other people of the Niu Ren clan congratulated in unison.

Ye Tian reached the three-star god general, and the official disciple of the reserve became an official disciple.

The identity of an official disciple is far more than a registered disciple!

Ye Tian is also the only official disciple of this universe, and it is their hope to leave the eternal universe in the future!

"Your Highness, please!"

Niu Ryu said happily.

Ye Tian, with the support of the Niu Ren clan, entered the temple.

As soon as he entered the temple, the temple spirit quotient appeared.

"Shang senior!"

Ye Tiandao.

"You're here!" Shang said lightly.

"Senior Shang, I have become a three-star god general, I wonder if I can become an official disciple of that great existence?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, but you need to test it!" Shang said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Shang arranged a small assessment and arranged the weakest three-star god general for Ye Tian to challenge.

Ye Tian easily defeated the opponent with the strength of a three-star god general and completed the assessment.

"Congratulations on becoming an official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!"

Shang congratulated.

"The master is called the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Not bad!" Shang nodded: "The name of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor can't be called casually, in the chaos, if anyone calls this name, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will know." For example, you and I just said that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor already knew. If ordinary people say it casually, it will be unlucky, make Dao Ancestor angry, and it will be erased directly across countless time and space. Therefore, few people in the chaos dared to call the name of Dao Ancestor. "

In chatting with Shang, Ye Tian learned about the problem of calling the strong people in the chaos.

The Heavenly Mandate Realm is the Heavenly Monarch, the True Spirit Realm is the True Monarch, the Dao Strongman is the True Ancestor, and the Dao Ancestor is the Dao Ancestor, and the Dao Ancestor is the most powerful existence in the chaos.

"Ye Tian, you have become an official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and you have a chance to meet the Dao Ancestor, this opportunity must be grasped well. "

Shang reminded.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian said very excitedly.
